creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Vladislav Shabanov from comment #29)
It's up to you on how to proceed.  I would like to see if the problem goes away if the FreeBSD interface in question is not contending with management traffic (dev.igb.XXX.mac_stats.mgmt_pkts_txd and recvd would be zero).  If so, then we can investigate what if anything can be done about this or if it is a firmware bug.
